tools.name: pot_generate
tools.description: Stamp a workflow step with a cryptographic Proof of Time. For Claude Code workflows: use eventId + prevEventId to build a causal chain that survives context compression. For DeFi: use txHash + chainId + poolAddress. One of eventId or txHash is required.

eventId.description: Workflow step identifier (Claude Code). E.g. 'refactor_auth_step1'. Call pot_query(eventId) after context compression to recover this step.

prevEventId.description: Previous step's eventId — links steps into a tamper-proof causal chain

chainId.description: EVM chain ID (DeFi, e.g. 8453 for Base, 84532 for Base Sepolia)

tools.name: pot_verify
tools.description: Verify a Proof of Time using its hash and integrity shards. Returns validity, mode (turbo/full), and timestamp. turbo = ordering preserved, full = tamper detected.

potHash.description: PoT hash to verify (hex with 0x prefix)

grgShards.description: Array of hex-encoded cryptographic integrity shards

chainId.description: EVM chain ID (e.g. 84532 for Base Sepolia)

tools.name: pot_query
tools.description: Query Proof of Time records. Call with eventId for O(1) exact step lookup after context compression (collision probability 2^-256). Call with startTime/endTime for time-range queries.

eventId.description: Exact step lookup — call this at workflow start to recover action history after context compression

tools.name: pot_graph
tools.description: Traverse the causal chain of workflow steps. Given an eventId, returns the full backward chain (ancestors via prevEventId) and forward chain (steps that follow). Use after context compression to reconstruct the complete workflow timeline.

eventId.description: The workflow step to start traversal from

tools.name: pot_stats
tools.description: Get Proof of Time statistics: call volume, mode distribution (turbo/full), average confidence score.

tools.name: pot_health
tools.description: Check PoT system health: time source status (NIST/Google/Cloudflare), subgraph sync, server uptime, current mode.
